creator: kaltheat@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

please update the port to version 3.28.0 (or newer if available in the meantime).

  https://github.com/epoupon/lms/releases/tag/v3.28.0

  https://github.com/epoupon/lms/compare/v3.25.2...v3.28.0


Could be as easily as changing PORTVERSION in Makefile and updating distinfo.

Unfortunately, I was not able to test it since compiling of go takes hours/days ...

Kind regards,
kaltheat
